name: HEMOPHAGOCYTIC LYMPHOHISTIOCYTOSIS
definition: macrophage-related disorder characterized by excess lymphocytes + activated macrophages,

demographics.Location: bone marrow, spleen, liver, lymph nodes

distribution: bone marrow, spleen, liver, lymph nodes
discriminating_features: subcortical white matter foci with ↑ T2 signal intensity

MR: subcortical white matter foci with ↑ T2 signal intensity
cerebral volume loss → dilated ventricles + prominent extra-axial fluid

clinical.Prognosis: variably relapsing + remitting / rapidly progressive; fatal if untreated
